creator: ashafer@badland.io
text:
Went to fix this today but seems jhale beat me to it with commit 0d5a698e4b4c31d7bdc94c11077109f74cdaceff (thanks!).

The reason I had used PKGNAME originally was so that I could add fixes to the patches in git, make a new tag, and bump the PORTREVISION to pick them up. Things have stabilized now so this isn't as much of a need, and that approach also has the nasty side effect of not letting others bump the version. As a result I think this change was a good idea.
